mapper.select: /* IncidentMapper.selectMaxReportNoByDate - 접수번호 추출 */ SELECT MAX(report_no) FROM incident WHERE report_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, #{today}, '%')

/* IncidentMapper.selectIncidentByReportNo - 접수내역 조회 */ SELECT a.site_cd , a.site_cd_list , b.site_name , a.report_no , a.report_date , a.addr , CONVERT(AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(a.cell_phone), 'RSOS') USING utf8) AS cell_phone , a.rpt_img_path , a.rpt_img_name FROM Incident a LEFT JOIN site_info b ON a.site_cd = b.site_cd AND b.del_yn = 'N' WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}

/* IncidentMapper.selectIncidentDetailByReportNo - 접수내역 조회 (상세) */ SELECT a.site_cd , b.site_name , a.report_no , a.report_date , a.intake_method_cd , a.status_cd , a.lat , a.lng , a.captured_at , a.accuracy_m , a.captured_ts , a.addr , CONVERT(AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(a.cell_phone), 'RSOS') USING utf8) AS cell_phone , a.rpt_img_path , a.rpt_img_name , a.process_note , a.img_path , a.img_name , a.img_path2 , a.img_name2 , a.img_path3 , a.img_name3 , a.img_path4 , a.img_name4 , a.manager_id , a.update_datetime , c.cd_code_nm AS statusNm , d.user_nm AS managerNm , e.cd_code_nm AS intakeMethodNm , a.ocr_read_km FROM Incident a LEFT JOIN site_info b ON a.site_cd = b.site_cd AND b.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN cd_common c ON a.status_cd = c.cd_code AND c.cd_div = '002' AND c.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN admin_user d ON a.manager_id = d.user_id AND d.use_yn = 1 LEFT JOIN cd_common e ON a.intake_method_cd = e.cd_code AND e.cd_div = '001' AND e.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}

/* IncidentMapper.selectIncidentCount - 사고접수 건수 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM incident a LEFT JOIN cd_common b ON a.status_cd = b.cd_code AND b.cd_div = '002' AND b.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE 1=1

sql.if: AND CONVERT(AES_DECRYPT(UNHEX(a.cell_phone), 'RSOS') USING utf8) LIKE CONCAT('%',#{cellPhone},'%')

mapper.select: /* IncidentMapper.selectIncidentImgByReportNo - 접수번호로 사고접수 이미지조회 */ SELECT rpt_img_path , rpt_img_name , img_path , img_name , img_path2 , img_name2 , img_path3 , img_name3 , img_path4 , img_name4 FROM Incident a WHERE report_no = #{reportNo}
